# Zaman Ishtiyaq — Freelance Full-Stack & AI Developer

> Zaman Ishtiyaq is a freelance Full-Stack and AI Developer available for hire. He builds custom websites, web apps, and AI-powered products for startups and businesses worldwide. 7+ years of engineering experience at Goldman Sachs, BrightEdge, and Atlan. Based in Srinagar, India — remote-friendly worldwide. Contact: zaman.ishtiyaq@gmail.com

## Available for Hire

Zaman Ishtiyaq is available for freelance and contract web development, full-stack application development, and AI integration projects. He works remotely with clients worldwide. Typical engagements include custom websites, SaaS web apps, AI-powered tools, and iOS apps. He has shipped six independent products to production. To hire him or discuss a project, email zaman.ishtiyaq@gmail.com or visit https://zamanishtiyaq.work/hire.

## About

Zaman Ishtiyaq is a Senior Software Engineer and AI Native Engineer currently at Atlan (Mar 2026–Present), previously at BrightEdge (Nov 2023–Feb 2026) and Goldman Sachs (Jul 2018–Sep 2023). He graduated from the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Bhubaneswar with a B.Tech in Computer Science, CGPA 8.97, ranking in the top 0.05% of JEE 2015.

He specializes in AI/LLM integration, distributed data pipelines, and full-stack web and iOS development. As an independent developer, he has shipped multiple products live on the App Store and the web.

## Current Role

At Atlan, Zaman works as an AI Native Engineer — migrating Redshift and Fivetran connectors from Argo to Automation Engine and Temporal, improving pipeline performance, reliability, and cost efficiency across enterprise data platforms.

## Key Facts

- 7+ years of professional software engineering experience
- IIT Bhubaneswar Computer Science graduate, top 0.05% JEE 2015 (CGPA 8.97)
- Worked at Goldman Sachs (5 years), BrightEdge (2+ years), Atlan (current)
- Two iOS apps live on the App Store: Muhasaba and Spree
- Specializes in AI/LLM integration, Temporal workflows, Kafka, and GCP
- Builds full-stack products independently from idea to production

## Projects

- [Offer X-Ray](https://www.offerxray.com/) — AI-powered offer letter analysis: upload an offer letter, get instant risk assessment, compensation breakdown, and negotiation guidance in under 5 minutes
- [Spree](https://www.tryspree.app/) — iOS wishlist app with AI virtual try-on: paste links from any store, swipe to rank, and try on outfits with AI before buying. Live on the App Store.
- [Muhasaba](https://muhasaba.me/) — iOS app for the Islamic daily practice of muhasaba: written or spoken reflection with guidance from Quran and Sunnah. Live on the App Store.
- [Architex](https://architex-two.vercel.app/) — Architecture practice management platform with stage-based workflows, document version control, site visit tracking, and AI assistant
- [ReelRocket](https://ugccreatorsfrontend.vercel.app/) — AI UGC content creation platform for hook scripts, demo videos, TikTok research, and product reviews
- [Ali Saffudin](https://alisaffudin.com/) — Bespoke artist website for musician Ali Saffudin, showcasing the Irtiqa EP with a cassette player and bilingual Arabic/English design

## Skills

Next.js, TypeScript, React, Python, Swift, SwiftUI, Java, Kafka, Temporal, Argo, GCP, Docker, PostgreSQL, AI/LLM Integration, Whisper, OpenAI API, OpenAI Agents SDK, Tailwind CSS

## Services

Zaman Ishtiyaq offers the following freelance development services:

- **Custom Website**: Marketing sites, landing pages, portfolio sites, and artist websites. Fast, SEO-optimised, mobile-first. Example: Ali Saffudin artist site, this portfolio.
- **Web Application**: Full-stack SaaS products, dashboards, and tools. Database to deployed frontend — one developer, full ownership. Examples: Offer X-Ray, Architex, ReelRocket.
- **AI Integration**: Add AI features to existing products or build AI-native tools from scratch — LLM pipelines, document analysis, content generation, chatbots, agentic workflows. Examples: OpenAI API integrations, Whisper voice transcription, multi-agent systems.
- **iOS App**: Native Swift/SwiftUI apps shipped to the App Store. Two live apps: Muhasaba and Spree.

Pricing: fixed-price for defined projects, hourly or retainer for ongoing work. Detailed quote before any work starts.

## Agentic AI

Zaman Ishtiyaq has hands-on experience building agentic AI systems — applications where LLM-powered agents take autonomous actions, use tools, and coordinate in multi-agent workflows.

Key experience:
- Designed a multi-agent restaurant management system using the OpenAI Agents SDK (order taking, kitchen coordination, inventory management agents)
- Uses Temporal for durable AI workflow orchestration at Atlan — ensuring long-running AI pipelines are reliable, retryable, and observable
- Built LLM pipelines with structured outputs, tool calling, and agent handoffs
- Integrates OpenAI API, GPT-4, Whisper, and custom prompting strategies in production

He writes about agentic AI at https://zamanishtiyaq.work/blog.

## Location & Availability

Zaman Ishtiyaq is based in Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India. He works remotely with clients worldwide across all time zones. He is comfortable with async communication and has worked with clients internationally throughout his freelance career.

For clients in Kashmir or India: he is available for local and regional projects — website builds, web app development, and AI integration. He understands the local market and can support in-person meetings in Srinagar for nearby clients.

For international clients: he has shipped production projects for clients in multiple countries. Remote-first. Available for discovery calls via video.

Status as of June 2026: accepting new freelance projects. Contact: zaman.ishtiyaq@gmail.com.

## FAQ

**Q: Is Zaman available for hire?**
A: Yes. As of June 2026, Zaman Ishtiyaq is accepting new freelance and contract projects. Email zaman.ishtiyaq@gmail.com or visit https://zamanishtiyaq.work/hire.

**Q: What is Zaman's tech stack?**
A: Next.js, TypeScript, React (frontend); Python, Node.js (backend); Swift/SwiftUI (iOS); PostgreSQL, GCP (infrastructure); OpenAI API, Agents SDK, Temporal (AI/ML).

**Q: Can Zaman build a website for my business in Kashmir?**
A: Yes. Zaman works with local businesses in Kashmir and Srinagar for custom website and web app development. He is familiar with the local market and available for in-person meetings in Srinagar.

**Q: How quickly can Zaman start a project?**
A: Usually within one week of scoping. Send a brief to zaman.ishtiyaq@gmail.com and he will confirm availability and send a quote.

**Q: Does Zaman handle design as well as development?**
A: Yes — he handles full-stack product work including UI/UX design, frontend, backend, and deployment. No need for a separate designer.
